reviews.name: places/ChIJF5HMjudr4okRlfeP5ivKot8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25keE1UQTNPRUpmT0RWMExWUlNNRXRVUkcxa2QyYxAB
reviews.text: I was first drawn to BeBalanced because it was a weight loss plan that included the use of herbs and not chemicals. My experience so far has been exceptional. Connie is a sweetheart as a coach. She is very attentive, enthusiastic, and knowledgeable. The program is clearly written out, using a journal, recipes and phone calls with Connie. Any concerns I had were resolved quickly. My menopause weight finally came off which was amazing in itself however my energy increased, my hot flashes disappeared, my joints felt better and my attitude towards myself improved. Any weight loss program is a commitment to yourself. This is the first one that I will be telling my friends about! Thank you for creating this program!

reviews.name: places/ChIJF5HMjudr4okRlfeP5ivKot8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OcFYyNHliRkZ2U21JeGQyUnVVa3hsUVY5R1puYxAB
reviews.text:
​I can't recommend this weight loss program enough, especially if you're a busy woman navigating perimenopause! ​What truly sets this program apart is how easy it is to incorporate into a demanding schedule. Forget spending hours tracking, weighing, and logging. The simple focus on a basic, whole-food ingredient list makes meal prep straightforward - I spent far less time in the kitchen and zero time stressing over complex macro calculations.

I do have to say, in a time when GLP1s and other weight loss medications are popular,  ​this isn't a quick-fix diet. I did lose 15 lbs my first 15 days, which was really encouraging! But it's more than a diet - it's a blueprint for building truly sustainable eating habits, making the transition down the road to maintenance feel natural, not restrictive. What I didn't anticipate was the significant alleviation of perimenopause symptoms thanks to the inclusion of hormone and gut-health supplements! My energy is up, the bloat is gone, and my sleep is better. It truly addresses the root causes of weight gain and discomfort during this life stage.

BeBalanced feels like a whole-body wellness experience. It's addresses the inside, the outside, and the mental components of weight loss, hormones, sleep, and gut health. And with a one on one coach, it's a lot of bang for your buck!

reviews.name: places/ChIJF5HMjudr4okRlfeP5ivKot8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210clFubDROWFJ0YXpsbmFsQk1VSGxrTURsVlpVRRAB
reviews.text: Hi! I’m 22 and I was diagnosed with PCOS at age 12. Between not being able to lose weight, extreme fatigue, wicked mood swings and major migraines,  it felt impossible to fix. I started BeBalanced in March and quickly things changed. Almost instantly my migraines stopped, I lost over 25lbs and my symptoms finally calmed down. I stopped birth control! My cycle got regular again, my energy came back, and I just feel like myself again. Overall I’m so happy I did this and would absolutely recommend to anyone!

reviews.text:
I cannot say enough about my experience with Grassroots Functional Medicine. From the moment I walked in, I felt truly heard and cared for in a way that is rare in healthcare today. The team takes the time to listen, not just to symptoms, but to the whole story—mind, body, and lifestyle. Their approach is thorough, compassionate, and genuinely personalized.

What impressed me most is how they combine cutting-edge functional medicine with a grassroots, people-first approach. They don’t just hand out quick fixes—they dig deep to uncover the root causes and provide sustainable solutions that actually restore health. Every recommendation felt intentional and tailored to my unique needs.

I’ve noticed real, lasting changes since beginning my care here—not only physically, but in my overall energy, mindset, and hope for long-term wellness. Grassroots isn’t just a practice; it’s a place where healing is made possible through expertise, empathy, and a genuine passion for helping people thrive.

If you’re looking for a team that truly partners with you on your health journey, Grassroots Functional Medicine is the place to go.

Thank you team!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJNzVsrl61tEwR-sJ8mmNdp9I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkUVNUbE9XRFZ6WWt3M1IzSkZVR2MxTjFobU1HYxAB
reviews.text: As a cancer survivor dealing with long term side effects and staying in the best health possible are both always at play.  Grassroots offer more data on how my body was functioning and resources to help it function to the best of its ability.  It is an investment, and I was ready to become a participant in my health vs continue to be a patient patient in the health care system. The people at Grassroots are supportive and also invested in my health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNzVsrl61tEwR-sJ8mmNdp9I/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNsdTdEZ2JBEAE
reviews.text:
I have struggled with multiple autoimmune diseases since I was a child and have seen many specialists and providers over the last 40 years only making marginal improvements. I had accepted that pain and discomfort was something I had to live with (and I did for many years) until I heard a podcast talking about Functional Medicine. I wondered if maybe this approach would be the ticket to better health. I immediately started researching providers in my area and came across GrassRoots Functional Medicine. I made the call and within a few weeks I was having my first visit with Dr.Osgood. This visit was eye-opening. Dr. Osgood compiled all of the information from my questionnaires and spent over an hour talking with me, getting to know me, understanding my medical history and inquiring about the issues that concerned me most. We made a plan that day...tests and labs were ordered, a visit was scheduled with the Nutritionist and Health Coach and for the first time in my life I felt heard. He wasn't trying to prescribe any medication to help mask my symptoms, he was trying to find out what was causing them. Shortly after my first visit I received a video explaining my test results to watch prior to our next meeting. This video was informative, comprehensive and was a great tool for me to refer to if I had questions or concerns. Dr.Osgood and his team treat you as an individual. If an approach isn't successful he makes adjustments that my body responds better to. There is a holistic approach at GrassRoots. I have learned so much about my diet and how food impacts the inflammation in my body. He understands that with chronic pain and illness also comes stress and anxiety. He and his team are so kind. I have never felt judged for any emotion I have had through this process.  The progress I have made in the last 2 years is pretty substantial...imagine if I had started on this journey sooner.
I am grateful everyday for this incredible crew of providers for helping to restore my health...both physically and mentally.
Take my advice and invest in yourself. Best decision I ever made.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNzVsrl61tEwR-sJ8mmNdp9I/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNIXzVEelF3EAE
reviews.text: All of the staff at Grassroots has been amazing. 9 months ago I could barely walk through the door.  My health and mental health were rock bottom.  Today I’m feeling like a new person.  I’ve worked hard and followed all of the recommendations, not always easy!  I have more energy, I’ve lost 35lbs, I eat healthily and walk 4-5 miles a day plus engage in other outside activities. I’m amazed at how much my mental health has improved and my outlook has changed from bleak and depressed to positive.  I now have tools to use and I’m continuing to make positive changes and improvements both physically and mentally. I will be continuing on with the maintenance plan at the end of the year. Honestly I can’t rate Grassroots high enough for the changes and improvements they’ve helped me to achieve.

reviews.name: places/ChIJNzVsrl61tEwR-sJ8mmNdp9I/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR5MHBESjZBRRAB
reviews.text:
I've worked with Seth and his team for many years now.  I've had their support and encouragement through good times and some very tough times.  Dr. Osgood is attentive, responsive, really listens, and recommends care and modification that is a real contribution to my health and wellness.  Everyone at Seth's office knows that there's not a one size fits all approach to health care.  I'm grateful for the personal attention to my health including making me aware of new research and approaches.
If you know somethings not right and you're not getting the answers or results from your current health care providers see Dr. Osgood.
I highly recommend this practice to maintain your wellness or improve your health.

reviews.text: I have been a patient of Boris Golosarsky for over ten years and cannot express what a truly great Physician he has been. In today’s world , it’s hard to find a medical professional that cares about you as a person and brings caring and honesty to every decision as if it were for his own family. reviews.name: places/ChIJv_FUbhi644kRx0Wo0LxVwZQ/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvZ2F2TTBBRRAB
reviews.text: I have never been a fan of any drs office and have avoided them for the better part of sixty years. Here's my experience with them at the Foundation of adult medicine. I had a work related injury (torn rotator  cuff and bicep) that needed surgery but due to high blood pressure I had to be seen and treated for hypertension before they would operate. Ok no problem. Since I never had a pcp I found this place to get one. My care provider was Stephanie Ballintine. Who prescribed a blood pressure medication for me and signed a ready for surgery letter for me. She also thought I should have a stress test,ultrasound,catscan, aids test,(even though I've been faithfully married for almost 30 years and really didn't want or need it) and a ton of blood work for God only knows what. Which I thought was covered by my insurance. Bottom line was they didn't do the stress test because my blood pressure was still to high but still billed me and never had an follow up consultation on any of these other tests. Within 60 days my account was turned over to a collection agency for nonpayment of almost 7k in medical bills. I have a deductible of 5k. I have been hassled almost daily by phone by these bill collectors. This office is about generating money and not patient care. I am so disappointed in this place. It's like bringing your car in for tire rotation and being told they will check the oil for you while your there then get a bill for 2500.00 for diagnostic services. I didn't ask for or needed. This old man was to trusting of this staff.

reviews.text: I cannot say enough great things about Dr. Stanizzi. reviews.name: places/ChIJMYS75Nuw44kR5fpGsq31U9U/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBMWZuQ2NBEAE
reviews.text:
Dr. Stanizzi has taken an unfortunate experience (kidney stones and a UPJ obstruction) and turned it into a much more tolerable and even educational experience for me. I truly appreciate that he takes the time to explain things to me thoroughly and in a way that is easy to understand.

I am an RN so I do have a baseline knowledge of anatomy and physiology, but I work for Foundation OBGYN so urology isn't my strong suit. Also, when you're a nurse, you really hate being the patient! He made it much easier for me to transition from the role of nurse to the role of the patient.

I also appreciated that he was so patient with me, being that I was in so much pain when I first met him and then afterwards I had just come out of anesthesia, I wasn't fully comprehending things and had to have him explain things a few times.

I would highly recommend him to anybody.

reviews.text: This place was the missing link to my health! After years of suffering from low energy, lost motivation that used to be unlimited, feeling sore and content sitting while life passed me by, diminished self esteem due to low libido, but more importantly feeling energized and excited about life; TRT was my missing link. After being contacted by my Case Manager Andrew and a consultation with Dr. Collins, my answers were in front of me. After my blood work, I had low testosterone. With the help of Andrew and Dr. Collins, one month into therapy all but confirmed I was on the right path. Now six months into my program with constant follow ups with my Case Manager Andrew, I'm happy to say my health is exactly where I wanted it to be. All of my symptoms are completely gone and even a few extra benefits too. My back pain is gone. My muscles knots I had in my back, shoulders, and neck have been completely dissolved. My brain can process inflammation easier and my memory has increased. I didn't even think of those other extra benefits because I had lived with them for so many years, they became normal. Now that they are gone, I'm completely blown away by the positive benefits I've received from being on TRT. Andrew has been a tremendous guide through this life changing process. He handles all of my questions and always gets back to me immediately when I need his help. Thank you Andrew, Dr. Collins, Elevation Pharmacy, and Renew for giving me my health back!

reviews.text:
Personally, I would look at other clinics. Northeast Men’s Health is too commercialized and it is all about money. I was put on the highest dose of clomid and my t-levels were around 390.  Paying 2600 a year. After the first blood test, (not including the consult blood test) I never heard from them until it was time to renew my care. After this blood test they doubled my medication. No blood test or follow up after the change.

As my year subscription was coming to an end, they reached out via text to get me to renew. This was the first time hearing from them in about 8-9 months.

I said I wanted another blood test to see where my levels were. When they came back at 390, the provided said it was probably just a bad reading, with no further explanation.

I decided to go to another clinic and not renew, and spoke about my experience. They looked at my levels and found high estradiol. Either way, I am doing treatment with the new place which seems much better and more personalized care. The care is about 1/3 of the cost of Northeast . Other providers don’t lock you into care and you can pay as you go.
